falsification_conditions.condition: The asset price closes above the 200-day moving average by at least 5% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A clear bullish breakout would contradict the HOLD signal and indicate a trend reversal invalidating the bottom pattern assumption

falsification_conditions.condition: Trading volume exceeds 200% of the 30-day average volume on three consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Sustained extreme volume would indicate forced buying/selling pressure, disproving the market's ability to hold the current price level

falsification_conditions.condition: The Volatility Index (VIX) drops below 15 and remains there for 5 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such extreme complacency would contradict the blowoff score's implication of market stress, invalidating the pattern's predictive validity

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
